headline: Chubb's Solid Growth Comes With a Premium Valuation - Hold or Buy?
summary: CB's global expansion, rising investment income and steady premium growth support long-term gains, but premium valuation and catastrophe risks temper the outlook.

headline: TRV Stock Up 4% YTD, Trades at 2.05X P/B: What Should Investors Know?
summary: TRV trades at 2.05x book as pricing momentum, rising investment income and more than $1B annual tech spending support growth despite a slight 2026 EPS decline.

headline: Travelers Schedules Conference Call to Review First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: NEW YORK, March 13, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) will review its first quarter 2026 results at 9:30 a.m. ET on Thursday, April 16, following the release of results earlier that morning.
